Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 113 

PRVDR_MDCD_ENRLMT_IND 

LABEL: Enrolled in Medicaid Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates the provider was enrolled in the Medicaid program; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_MDCD_ENRLMT_IND 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_MDCD_ENRLMT_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes
